passive.name: Leverage
passive.description: Renata's Attacks deal bonus damage and mark enemies. Renata's allies can damage marked enemies to deal bonus damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Renata Glasc|Renata}} basic attacks apply a mark that lasts a few seconds and expires when attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, this also deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Allied {{tip|champions|champions'}} damaging attacks and abilities against a marked target will consume the mark to deal {{as|magic damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Renata's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to apply a mark that lasts 6 seconds, refreshes on subsequent hits and expires when attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, the attack also deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{as|{{pp|key=%|1 to 2 for 9}}|health}} {{as|(+ 2% per 100 AP)}} {{as|of the target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Allied {{tip|champions|champions'}} damaging attacks and abilities against a marked target will consume the mark to deal {{as|additional '''bonus''' magic damage|magic damage}} equal to {{as|{{pp|key=%|1 to 2 for 9}}|health}} {{as|(+ 2% per 100 AP)}} {{as|of the target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Leverage's'' damage is capped at 150 against epic {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not block the mark's application.
** {{Pending for test}}: Interaction with mark consumption
* The mark's consumption by an ally respects {{tip|enchantment redirection}}.

Q.name: Handshake
Q.description: Renata sends out a missile rooting the first enemy hit, and can recast the ability to throw the unit in a direction.
Q.tooltip:
Renata sends out a missile from her arm, Rooting the first enemy hit for {{ rootduration }} second and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.

Recast: Renata Pulls the enemy in a direction, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to enemies they are thrown into and Stunning for {{ stunduration }} seconds if the thrown enemy is a champion.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Renata Glasc|Renata}} fires a hook in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and briefly {{tip|root|roots}} them. She can recast the ability while the target is rooted.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Renata''' {{tip|airborne|knocks}} the target in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. If the thrown target is a {{tip|champion}}, enemies hit are briefly {{tip|stun|stunned}}.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Renata''' fires a hook in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|root|roots}} them for 1 second, during which they are {{tip|true sight|revealed}}.

If the {{tip|root}} was applied, '''Renata''' forms a {{tip|tether}} between her and the target for the same duration, causing '''Renata''' to become unable to declare attacks and have her {{as|movement speed}} '''reduced''' by {{as|30%|ms}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Handshake'' can be recast while the tether is active.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Renata''' breaks the tether to {{tip|airborne|knock}} the target in the target direction, though not through terrain, dealing the same damage to enemies they pass through. If the thrown target is a {{tip|champion}}, all secondary targets hit are {{tip|stun|stunned}} for {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{tt|16|Starts post-effect if an enemy is hit, on-cast if not}}
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} to the primary target and {{tip|area damage}} to secondary targets.
* ''Handshake's'' interaction between its tether and root:
** If the root is not applied, neither is the tether.
** The tether's duration lasts the same as the root duration, even if it is modified by {{tip|tenacity}}.
** If the root is removed, the tether is as well, but not vice versa.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the hook but not the recast's effects as the primary target.
** As a secondary target, the recast's effects will be blocked.
* '''Renata''' may still move while the hook is in flight.
** Her facing direction is locked towards the target direction of the hook.
* While the target is hooked, '''Renata's''' facing direction is considered to be in their direction and not in the one she is moving.
* The {{stil|movement speed}} reduction stacks additively with other {{as|movement speed}} bonuses.
** It is a negative bonus, not a {{tip|slow}}, and is thus not reduced by {{tip|slow resist}}.
{{Effect at cast time start}}

W.name: Bailout
W.description: Renata buffs an allied champion to fight harder, delaying their death and potentially saving them if they get a takedown.
W.tooltip:
Renata infuses an ally champion, granting {{ ascalc }} Attack Speed and {{ mscalc }} Move Speed towards enemies, increasing to {{ finalascalc }} Attack Speed and {{ finalmscalc }} Move Speed over {{ duration }} seconds. Takedowns refresh the duration of the buff.

If the ally would die, they instead return to full Health, which then decays over 3 seconds.

If they get a Takedown while decaying, they will be set to {{ triumphpercent }}% max Health and stop decaying.

The Champion's death can be delayed by healing or similar effects while in the decaying state, but cannot be prevented unless the Champion gets a Takedown. Champions can only delay their death once.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Renata Glasc|Renata}} grants herself or the target allied champion ramping {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} in addition to {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} toward enemies. ''Bailout's'' duration resets whenever the target scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the target would {{tip|death|die}} while ''Bailout'' is active, their health is set back to full but they suffer a {{as|true damage}} burn that would kill them over a short time. The target can stop the burn by scoring a {{tip|takedown}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Renata''' infuses herself or the target allied champion with a chemtech formula for 5 seconds, granting the target {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while they are facing nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy champions or minions, with both of the bonuses increasing in effectiveness by {{pp|key=%|type=seconds elapsed|0 to 100 for 21|0 to 5}}. ''Bailout's'' duration resets whenever the target scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 6 seconds of damaging them.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|10 to 30}}% {{as|(+ 1% per 100 AP)}}|Maximum Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|10*2 to 30*2}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|1*2}}% per 100 AP)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|10 to 20}}% {{as|(+ 1% per 100 AP)}}|Maximum Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|10*2 to 20*2}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|1*2}}% per 100 AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2:
If the target takes {{tip|death|fatal damage}} while ''Bailout'' is active, they are restored to {{as|100% of their '''maximum''' health}} but suffer a {{sti|{{as|true damage}}}} burn equal to {{as|10% of their '''maximum''' health}} every {{rutngt|0.25}} until they die from reaching 0 health, during which ''Bailout's'' duration is reset every {{fd|0.25}} seconds. This effect may occur only ''once'' per application of ''Bailout'' while the target already has the buff and is not burning.

The burn will stop once the target scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 6 seconds of damaging them, setting their {{as|'''current''' health}} to {{as|20% of their '''maximum''' health}} immediately afterwards.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1300|Radius for movement speed towards enemies}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Damage taken in excess of the fatal damage taken does not apply to the target's health after it was restored.
* The self-damage taken is considered {{tip|raw damage}} and is calculated based on the target's '''maximum''' health at the time of taking lethal damage.
* ''Bailout's'' bonuses will not reset in effectiveness if its duration is refreshed.
* ''Bailout'' takes priority over all {{tip|resurrection}} and {{tip|zombie state}} effects.
* ''Bailout'' will stop refreshing its duration while the target is burning after 250 seconds have elapsed.
* ''Bailout'' cannot be used on {{tip|clone|clones}} nor {{tip|zombie state|zombie state}} units.
* If the target takes fatal damage during ''Bailout'', upon destroying a turret while being targeted by it, they will receive their own [[Kill#Champion bounties|bonus shut-down bounty]] (ignoring the base kill reward of 300 gold) instead of being executed.{{bug|1}}

E.name: Loyalty Program
E.description: Renata sends out a pair of chemtech missiles, shielding allies and damaging and slowing enemies hit.
E.tooltip: Renata sends out a pair of chemtech missiles, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slowing surrounding enemies and enemies hit by 30% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. Allies hit gain {{ shieldcalc }} Shield for {{ shieldduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Renata Glasc|Renata}} sends out two chemtech rockets that strike targets around her, then converge into a single missile that explodes at the target location.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Renata''' and allies struck are granted a {{tip|shield}}, and enemies struck are dealt {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Renata''' sends out chemtech rockets from either side of her that instantly strike targets around her. After {{rutngt|0.4}} they converge and travel to the target location as a single missile, striking targets along its path and exploding upon reaching the target location.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Renata''' and allies struck are granted a {{tip|shield}} for 3 seconds and enemies struck are dealt {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 30% for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|65 to 185}} {{as|(+ 55% AP)}}}}
{{st|Shield Strength|{{ap|50 to 110}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Loyalty Program will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|325|Initial hit radius around Renata}} / {{tt|225|Missile explosion radius upon arriving at the target location}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|1450|Missile speed, spawns up-to 200 units closer to the cast location already}}

R.name: Hostile Takeover
R.description: Renata sends out a wave of chemicals, causing any enemies hit to go Berserk.
R.tooltip:
Renata sends out a wave of chemicals, Berserking enemies for {{ berserkduration }} seconds, causing them to Attack the nearest unit, prioritizing their allies.

While Berserk, enemies gain {{ bonusattackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Renata''' launches a cloud of potent chemicals that travels in the target direction. Enemy champions and minions hit briefly become {{tip|berserk}}, gaining {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|Berserk|nolink=true}}:}} Berserk causes the target to prioritize attacking their allies over their enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Renata''' launches a cloud of potent chemicals that travels in the target direction, granting {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. Enemy champions and minions hit become {{tip|berserk}} for a duration.
wiki_detail.description2:
''Berserked'' units gain {{sti|{{as|100% '''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and 25% increased [[size]]. Within their targeting radius, they prioritize attacking the closest unit by the following categories in descending order:
# Their allied champions 
# Allied non-champions
# Allied {{tip|wards}}
# Enemy units (including {{tip|monster|monsters}})
wiki_detail.angle: {{tt|14{{Degree}}|Angle at which the outermost cloud missiles fan out from Renata times two, estimated}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|sight|icononly = true}} {{tt|750|Cloud missiles sight radius, pending for test}} / {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1000|Berserker seek target radius}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|650 - 1000|Acceleration by 50 per second, pending for test}}
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
:''See [[Types of Crowd Control#Berserk]] for specific details on Berserk.''
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* Typically, any enemies killed that directly result from ''Berserk'' are credited to '''Renata Glasc'''.
wiki_detail.tips: * ''Berserked'' enemies that use {{si|Smite}} to execute monsters will gain kill credit, not '''Renata'''.
